race.comment: CAMPIONE D'ITALIA (1) bounced off his unlucky fourth in the G1 Golden Slipper, with a comfortable victory over 1400m in the G1 ATC Sires' Produce Stakes at this track. Looks to have more to offer and will be even stronger out to the 1600m. Expected to win again. FIREBALL (2) went back from the wide draw and circled the field with a courageous third over 1400m in the G1 ATC Sires' Produce Stakes at this track. Stuck on well last start and gets a much better run here. Sure to be thereabouts. MISS CHANEL (10) strong through the line from last on the turn with a gritty second over 1400m in the G1 ATC Sires' Produce Stakes. Tough filly with genuine top-three claims. SOUTHEND (4) up quickly in grade with a dominant win in the G3 The TL Baillieu Handicap over 1400m at Rosehill. Minor claims. GRINZINGER HEART (11) smart filly who comes up from Victoria after winning the G2 VRC Sires' over 1400m at Flemington. Kept up to the mark with two trials and will roll forward and give plenty of cheek.
